content: I'm going to be starting to work towards devicemapper bindings. I talked with the person previously working on this and they said this work had been deprioritized for them so I'm gonna take a look. I wanted to start with understanding what the state of bio abstractions are at the moment. Is anyone actively working on this? Does someone have a patch set that I should base my work off of or should I start with the work by wrapping the bio API?
I am working on bio, at least the parts relevant to blk-mq. See null_blk and nvme patches and let me know if you have any questions
